# 3D Presentation Studio

> White-label SaaS platform by Transcendence Media that lets managed service
> providers (MSPs) build, brand, and distribute interactive 3D Matterport
> property tour presentations. Clients customize and download a single
> self-contained HTML presentation file they own and can host anywhere.
> One-time purchase — no subscriptions, no per-tour fees.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing for MSPs.
- [For Agents](/agents): Directory of MSPs serving real estate agents, with location-based search.
- [Atlas](/atlas): Interactive dark-themed map of verified immersive 3D listings.
- [Opportunities](/opportunities): Local Demand Board showing markets where agents are waiting for an MSP.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How 3DPS collects, uses, and protects data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): License terms, payment terms, IP, and acceptable use.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/login): Account sign-in.
- [Activate Studio](/signup): MSP account creation.
